title: CNP Nashik Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 534 Junior Technician, Supervisor and More Posts
post_name: Junior Technician, Supervisor, Welfare Officer, Safety Officer, Secretarial Assistant, Artist (Graphic Design), Junior Office Assistant and More
short_info: CNP Nashik SPMCIL invites online applications for 534 Junior Technician, Supervisor, Safety Officer, Welfare Officer, Artist vacancies. Interested 10th / ITI / Diploma / Graduate / Post Graduate candidates can apply online and download the official notification from the website. The application process closes on 3 June 2026.

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay the application fee as prescribed in the official notification. The fee must be paid through online mode only. Applications submitted without the prescribed fee or through an incorrect payment mode shall be rejected. Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are advised to retain proof of fee payment for future reference.

age_limit.age_details: 18 to 25 / 28 / 30 Years (Post-wise, as on closing date)

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will receive pay and allowances as per the prescribed pay scales for their respective posts. The salary structure is as follows:

selection_process: Selection Process Computer Based Test (CBT) i.e. Online Test

The selection process for the above-mentioned posts will be based mainly on an Online Examination. The final selection will be prepared strictly on the basis of the merit list of marks obtained in the online test. However
how_to_apply: Candidates are required to apply online only through the official website cnpnashik.spmcil.com under the "Careers" section. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online application window is open from 20 April 2026 to 3 June 2026. Candidates must read the detailed advertisement carefully before applying and ensure all details provided are accurate. All updates including admit card, examination dates, and results will be available only on the official website.
Visit the official website cnpnashik.spmcil.com and go to the "Careers" section.
Click on the link for the online application (available from 20 April 2026).
Register and fill the online application form with all required details.
important_instructions: Candidates applying for CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026 must carefully read all instructions mentioned in the official notification before submitting their application. The advertisement is for centralized recruitment across 04 units of SPMCIL - CNPN-Nashik, ISPN-Nashik, BNPD-Dewas, and SPPH-Hyderabad. The number of vacancies is tentative and may change as per organisational requirement.

Candidates must read the complete detailed notification on the official website before applying. The number of vacancies is tentative and may increase or decrease without prior notice. All updates, admit cards, and results will be available only on the official website. Application fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For any clarification, refer to the detailed notification on cnpnashik.spmcil.com from 20 April 2026 onwards. This recruitment is centralized for 04 SPMCIL units: CNPN-Nashik, ISPN-Nashik, BNPD-Dewas, and SPPH-Hyderabad.
